name: HERE Geocoding & Search
description: Geocode addresses, reverse-geocode coordinates, autocomplete addresses as-you-type, and search places via the HERE Location Services API. Useful for address validation, delivery-route planning, and storefront locators. Free tier covers 250k requests/month.
instructions:
This connector uses the HERE Geocoding & Search v7 REST API.

**Credentials**: generate a REST API key at https://platform.here.com → Projects → API Keys. Paste it into `HERE_API_KEY` when importing. The key is passed as a query parameter (`apiKey`), not as a header.

**Pricing**: HERE's Freemium plan includes 250,000 requests/month free. Bulk batch geocoding requires a paid plan.

**Countries**: worldwide coverage. Use `in=countryCode:DEU` or ISO 3-letter country filter for scope.

**Addressing strategies**:
- `/geocode` — full forward geocoding (structured or unstructured input)
- `/autocomplete` — very fast address autocomplete, returns short snippets
- `/autosuggest` — richer suggestions including POIs, chains, addresses
- `/revgeocode` — coordinates → address
- `/discover` — place search with categories, brands, opening hours

**Languages**: add `lang=de` or any BCP-47 tag to localise labels.

**In Germany / Baustoff use-case**: use `in=countryCode:DEU&lang=de` to force German labels on addresses for consistency with ERP records.

tools.name: here_geocode
tools.description: Forward-geocode an address to coordinates. Returns matches with position, label, address components (country, state, city, postalCode, street, houseNumber), result type, and match quality score.

qq.description: Qualified query — structured address as key=value;… pairs (e.g. 'city=Freiburg;street=Kaiser-Joseph-Straße;houseNumber=1'). Use for disambiguation.

in.description: Area filter (e.g. 'countryCode:DEU' to scope to Germany, or 'bbox:w,s,e,n').

tools.name: here_reverse_geocode
tools.description: Reverse-geocode coordinates to a human-readable address. Returns the nearest address with full components.

tools.name: here_autocomplete
tools.description: Fast address-only autocomplete for as-you-type address fields. Returns short labelled snippets. Use when you only need addresses and want the lowest latency.

at.description: Optional anchor coordinates 'lat,lng' — biases results near the given point.

tools.name: here_autosuggest
tools.description: Rich autosuggest — returns addresses AND places/POIs (shops, chains, landmarks). Ideal for search bars where users might type either an address or a business name.

at.description: Required for place results — anchor coordinates 'lat,lng'.

tools.name: here_discover
tools.description: Discover places, POIs, and businesses near a location or within an area — filterable by category (e.g. 'building-material' Baustoffhandel), chain, or brand. Returns each match with position, contact info, opening hours.

at.description: Anchor coordinates 'lat,lng' — required if `in` is not provided.

in.description: Area filter (bbox or circle) — required if `at` is not provided.
